prompt_text:
### Demographics: 53-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 86.4 kg; Height 171.7 cm; BMI 29.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/65 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.1%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 8.1%; 3 months ago 8.0%; current 8.1%), FPG (12 months ago 221mg/dL; 9 months ago 221mg/dL; 6 months ago 212mg/dL; 3 months ago 214mg/dL; current 191mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 87.9kg; 9 months ago 89.9kg; 6 months ago 85.3kg; 3 months ago 85.9kg; current 86.4kg), Height (12 months ago 171.7cm; 9 months ago 171.7cm; 6 months ago 171.7cm; 3 months ago 171.7cm; current 171.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 29.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 66mmHg; 9 months ago 67mmHg; 6 months ago 65mmHg; 3 months ago 65mmHg; current 65mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 117U/L; 9 months ago 102U/L; 6 months ago 94U/L; 3 months ago 86U/L; current 118U/L), AST (12 months ago 96U/L; 9 months ago 90U/L; 6 months ago 78U/L; 3 months ago 70U/L; current 97U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 69mg/g; 9 months ago 68mg/g; 6 months ago 46mg/g; 3 months ago 67mg/g; current 58mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 82mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 169mg/dL; 9 months ago 163mg/dL; 6 months ago 185mg/dL; 3 months ago 163mg/dL; current 174mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 15.0g/dL; 9 months ago 15.0g/dL; 6 months ago 15.0g/dL; 3 months ago 14.2g/dL; current 14.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
